title: lichen-oscore edhoc feature does not compile: rand_core::OsRng requires getrandom feature
description: Cargo.toml adds rand_core without getrandom feature (see rand_core lib.rs cfg). Causes E0425 on StaticSecret::random_from_rng in edhoc.rs:317,756. P0 build breaker. RNG change direction incorrect/incomplete. Review of Cargo.toml edit and related changes.
